svg.title: Cinderborne sprite sheet — 4 mutations × 4 animation states
svg.desc: Cinderborne: primal inferno-spirit that leaves scorched marks everywhere. 16 frames across Inferno Orange, Ember Crimson, Ashen White, and Volcanic Black mutations.
svg.text: Fire · Common · Primal inferno-spirit, leaves scorched marks · Fav: Heat lamp
